question_text: Suppose that 𝑋 has the probability density function 𝑓(𝑥) = { Γ(𝛼) 𝑥𝛼−1𝑒−𝜆𝑥 𝑖𝑓 𝑥> 0 0 𝑜𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑟𝑤𝑖𝑠𝑒, where 𝛼> 0 and 𝜆> 0. Which one of the following statements is NOT true?

options.A: 𝐸(𝑋) exists for all 𝛼> 0 and 𝜆> 0
options.B: Variance of 𝑋 exists for all 𝛼> 0 and 𝜆> 0
options.C: 𝑋 ) exists for all 𝛼> 0 and 𝜆> 0
options.D: 𝐸(log𝑒(1 + 𝑋)) exists for all 𝛼> 0 and 𝜆> 0
